metadata.title: Grok Imagine - AI Image & Video Generator | Marble AI
metadata.description: Grok Imagine by xAI. Multimodal image and video generation model that converts text or images into short visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

hero.title: Grok Imagine
hero.description: xAI's multimodal image and video generation model. Convert text or images into short visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio capabilities.

introduce.title: About Grok Imagine
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Grok Imagine is xAI's multimodal image and video generation model that converts text or images into short visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio.

items.title: Multimodal Generation
items.description: Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image generation for versatile creative workflows.

items.title: Video Capabilities
items.description: Generate short video outputs with coherent motion from text or image inputs.

items.title: Synchronized Audio
items.description: Produces outputs with synchronized audio for complete multimedia experiences.

items.title: Coherent Motion
items.description: Advanced motion generation ensuring smooth and natural visual transitions.

items.title: What is Grok Imagine?
items.description: Grok Imagine is xAI's multimodal image and video generation model that converts text or images into visual outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Grok Imagine supports both Text To Image (generating images from text) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: Can it generate videos?
items.description: Yes! Grok Imagine can generate short video outputs with coherent motion and synchronized audio.

items.title: Who created Grok Imagine?
items.description: Grok Imagine is created by xAI, Elon Musk's artificial intelligence company.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images and videos generated with Grok Imagine through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Grok Imagine's multimodal capabilities, video generation with coherent motion, and synchronized audio set it apart from other models.

cta.title: Ready to Try Grok Imagine?
cta.description: Experience xAI's multimodal generation model. Create images and videos with coherent motion.
